display.name: Split Axle on the Verge
display.short_description: A wagon sits dead on the verge with one axle split through and the wheel rolled halfway into the ditch.

choices.label: Pry the hoop iron loose
choices.summary: The rim comes off in one useful length if you lean your weight on it hard enough.

choices.label: Tear open the food chest and move
choices.summary: Most of it has spoiled, but a few salted scraps are still worth carrying.
